mainEntity.name: Do you handle TDS compliance along with bookkeeping?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Our bookkeeping package includes TDS computation on all payments, TDS payment tracking, and quarterly TDS return filing (24Q for salary, 26Q for non-salary, 27Q for foreign payments). TDS certificates (Form 16/16A) are also generated.

mainEntity.name: Can you handle accounting for a trading company with high volumes?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We handle trading companies with thousands of monthly invoices — purchase recording, sales accounting, stock reconciliation, and margin analysis. We use Tally Prime for high-volume trading operations with batch-wise import capabilities.

mainEntity.name: How quickly can you start bookkeeping for my Mumbai business?

acceptedAnswer.text: We can begin within 3-5 working days after onboarding. If you have a backlog, we handle catch-up bookkeeping in parallel with current-period accounting.
